sshkeys.title: SSH Keys
sshkeys.desc: Manage the SSH public keys authorised to log in to this router as root. Keys are stored in the router configuration and re-applied on every boot, so they survive reboots and firmware upgrades. Security-key (FIDO/YubiKey) types sk-ssh-ed25519 and sk-ecdsa are supported.
sshkeys.empty: No keys yet. Paste a public key above to add one.
sshkeys.err_invalid: That does not look like a valid SSH public key.
sshkeys.confirm_remove: Remove this key? A client using it will no longer be able to log in.
